title: Organisational Capacity Assessment
description: Evaluate your NGO's core competencies, from governance to financial management, to identify strengths and areas for growth.

questions.text: Does your organisation have a formally registered Board of Directors that meets regularly?

options.text: Yes, we have a fully functional and engaged Board.
Yes, but they rarely meet or engage in strategic oversight.
We are in the process of forming a Board.
No, we do not have a Board.

questions.text: How would you describe your financial management systems?

options.text: We use professional accounting software and have annual external audits.
We use basic spreadsheets and reconcile accounts monthly.
We track expenses informally and have no external audits.
We do not have a formal financial management system.

questions.text: Does your organisation have a clear, documented strategic plan?

options.text: Yes, an updated multi-year plan guides our daily operations.
We have an older strategic plan that is somewhat used.
We have short-term plans but no long-term strategy.
No documented strategic plan exists.

questions.text: How effectively do you measure the impact of your projects?

options.text: We have a dedicated M&E framework with clear indicators for all projects.
We measure impact occasionally, mostly when donors require it.
We collect basic output data (e.g., number of attendees) but not impact.
We do not systematically measure impact.

questions.text: Do you have formal HR policies including Safeguarding and Code of Conduct?

options.text: Yes, all staff are trained and sign these policies annually.
We have the documents, but they are rarely reviewed or enforced.
We have basic guidelines but no formal policies.
No HR or safeguarding policies in place.

title: Proposal Readiness Assessment
description: Determine if your organisation is ready to apply for major institutional funding.

questions.text: Do you have at least 3 years of audited financial statements?

options.text: Yes, unconditionally clean audits.
Yes, but with some management letter findings.
We have 1-2 years of audits.
No external audits conducted yet.
